name: Granary
note: Stores grain so the settlement eats through a bad week. (Starter — no tech required.)

name: Cellar
note: A cool root cellar — early-round storage. (Starter — no tech required.)

name: Smokehouse
note: Requires Cooking. Cured meat keeps spirits up through winter.

name: Trading Post
note: A roadside stall with a post and a horn. (Starter — no tech required.)

name: Hunter's Lodge
note: Requires Foraging. Game and pelts in equal measure.

name: Apiary
note: Requires Beekeeping. Bees provide more than honey.

name: Barracks
note: Requires Stick Fighting. Drill ground and a roof for the spears.

name: Library
note: Requires Library + Reading. Shelf, ledger, lamp.

name: Walls
note: Requires Walls + Masonry. Stout earthworks rimming the village.

name: Mill
note: Requires Mill + Farming. Grinds grain and saws lumber off the same wheel.

name: Tavern
note: Requires Beer Brewing. Cheap drink, loud songs, fewer fights at dawn.

name: Watchtower
note: Requires Town Watch. Visible safety calms the settlement.

name: Bath House
note: Requires Plumbing. Steam, gossip, clean people.

name: Smithy
note: Requires Smithing. Edges sharper, plates thicker.

name: Apothecary
note: Requires Herb Lore. Tinctures the priests would frown at.

name: Brewery
note: Requires Beer Brewing + Cooking. Beer pays in coin and good cheer.

name: Pottery
note: Requires Ceramics. Pots for storage, jugs for sale.

name: Looms
note: Requires Weaving. Cloth into clothes, looms into cloth.

name: Tannery
note: Requires Tanning. Hides into leather; saddles for the riders.

name: Fight Pit
note: Requires Stick Fighting. A pit, a rope, and a payday for the bare-knuckle champ.

name: Stables
note: Requires Horseback Riding. Mounts ready when Defense needs them.

name: Quarry Camp
note: Requires Mining. Stone hauled out daily.

name: Charcoal Burner
note: Requires Cooking + Mining. Coals for forges and stews alike.

name: Forge
note: Requires Iron Working + Smelting. Hammer, anvil, billet — the soldiers thank the forgemen.

name: Market
note: Requires Markets. The day the merchants open is the day the streets fill.

name: Mint
note: Requires Currency. Stamps a coin you can trust farther than the next valley.

name: Workshop
note: Requires Apprenticeship. Tools beget tools.

name: Scriptorium
note: Requires Inks. Pamphlets, ledgers, broadsheets — copied by hand.

name: Customs House
note: Requires Tariffs. Toll keepers with neat ledgers.

name: Trade Caravan
note: Requires Trade Routes. On the road three weeks of every four.

name: Glassworks
note: Requires Glassblowing. Lenses and bottles, both in demand.

name: Drill Yard
note: Requires Tactics. Daily drills with practice spears.

name: Theater
note: Requires Theater. Players, plays, and unstable poets.

name: Engineering Guild
note: Requires Engineering. They calculate the load before they pour the foundation.

name: Counting House
note: Requires Banking. Ledgers thick enough to stop a knife.

name: Armory
note: Requires Armor + Smithing. Racks of plate and shield.

name: Cathedral
note: Requires Religion + Masonry. Stained glass, taller than memory.

name: Garrison
note: Requires Logistics. Beds, mess, drill — all under one roof.

name: Infirmary
note: Requires Herbalism. Convalescent rooms double as soldier billets.

name: Bank
note: Requires Banking + Currency. Where the loans live and the ledgers sleep.

name: Tower
note: Requires Walls + Masonry. Tall enough to see the whole valley.

name: Aqueduct
note: Requires Plumbing + Bridges. Clean water at every fountain.

name: Ironworks
note: Requires Smelting + Iron Working. Bigger billets, bigger blades.

name: Temple
note: Requires Religion. Old gods, new theories.

name: Windmill
note: Requires Mill + Engineering. Wind on the high field; sails and gears below.

name: Watermill
note: Requires Mill + Bridges. Wheel turns whether the wind blows or not.

name: Master Smith
note: Requires Plate Armor + Smithing. Exquisite, rare work.

name: Engineering College
note: Requires Engineering Theory + School. Teach, then build it.

name: School
note: Requires School + Library + Pedagogy. Where the next generation overtakes the last.

name: Royal Mint
note: Requires Currency + Banking. The chief's seal pressed into bullion.

name: Grand Bazaar
note: Requires Markets + Tariffs. Every booth selling something different.

name: Citadel
note: Requires Walls + Engineering. Headquarters on a hill.

name: Foundry
note: Requires Smelting + Apprenticeship. Pour, cool, hammer, repeat.

name: Hospice
note: Requires Herbalism + Religion. Wings on wings of cots and clean linens.

name: Palace
note: Requires Leadership + Architecture. The chief's actual house.

name: Arsenal
note: Requires Plate Armor + Siegecraft. Every shelf a weapon, every rack a row.

name: Wonder of Bronze
note: Requires Architecture + Master Crafts. A statue taller than the keep.

name: Grand Theater
note: Requires Theater + Architecture. Sold out, every season.

name: Fortress
note: Requires Walls + Plate Armor. A keep thick enough to last a siege.
